commands.name: red-derived-path-test
commands.purpose: Red gate for the new catalog regression test before changing library.yaml.
commands.observed_result: Expected failure: the test derived ~/.local/share/library/mcp-servers/cognovis-tools/cognovis-library-core/mcp-servers/cognovis-tools but the catalog still contained ~/.local/share/library/cognovis-library-core/mcp-servers/cognovis-tools.

commands.name: green-derived-path-test
commands.purpose: Green gate for the new catalog regression test after repointing library.yaml.

commands.name: validate-library
commands.purpose: Smoke validation that library.yaml still conforms to docs/schema/library.schema.json.
commands.observed_result: PASS: library.yaml is valid against docs/schema/library.schema.json.

commands.name: full-deploy-clone-tests-initial
commands.purpose: Initial full-file regression run requested by the bead.
commands.observed_result: 11 passed and 1 failed. The failure was a sandbox PermissionError writing /Users/malte/.config/library/global.lock in an existing integration test, not a catalog-path assertion failure.

commands.name: full-deploy-clone-tests
commands.command: HOME=/private/tmp/clhqaj-home PYTHONPATH=/Users/malte/code/library/meta/.claude/worktrees/bead-CL-hqaj/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache-clhqaj uv run pytest tests/test_mcp_deploy_clone.py -q
commands.purpose: Full-file regression run with HOME redirected to writable temp space for the existing global-lock integration test.

commands.name: grep-no-shared-supervised-block
commands.purpose: Confirm the cognovis-tools supervised_local_service block no longer references the shared deploy clone path.
commands.observed_result: No matches, which is the expected result for this negative grep.

commands.name: grep-nested-supervised-block
commands.purpose: Confirm the cognovis-tools supervised_local_service block contains the installer-derived per-mcp deploy project path.
commands.observed_result: Eight matches: install, start, health_check, restart, stop, uninstall, stdio_rollback, and legacy_stdio_descriptors[0].args.

commands.name: artifact-validation
commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache-clhqaj uv run python /Users/malte/.agents/skills/beads/scripts/implementation_artifacts.py validate --manifest .beads/runs/clhqaj-20260713T191625/implementation_manifest.json --evidence .beads/runs/clhqaj-20260713T191625/evidence_ledger.json --bead-id CL-hqaj
commands.purpose: Validate the required implementation_manifest.json and evidence_ledger.json shapes.
commands.observed_result: status ok; manifest_errors and evidence_errors were empty.
